title: Add installer progress indicator during port preflight rerun
acceptanceCriteria: After suggested-port or manual-port confirmation, interactive install shows a clear in-progress state while saving the selected override and rerunning planned-port preflight.
The new indicator uses the existing installer progress surface rather than introducing a separate ad-hoc UI.
Port-preflight product semantics remain unchanged: same override target, same preflight rerun, same supported reuse/conflict behavior, no hidden auto-rebind.
Deterministic regression coverage proves the intermediate progress state is visible before the rerun completes.
